name: jurist-workspace
description: Jurist – Albanian procurement document management platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt --quiet
scripts.db:start: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db && node scripts/wait-for-db.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACK,FRONT -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n BACK,FRONT -c cyan,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
